steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures on each side of the blank
steps.content: The blank must complete the first sentence: “What increases is the rate at which the water turns to ___.” The word vapor supplies that object. After the period, the next sentence begins with the introductory prepositional phrase “With a pressure cooker pot, though,” before the independent clause about the airtight seal.

steps.title: Apply the rule for joining independent clauses
steps.content:
Choice A (‘vapor. With’) correctly completes the first sentence and then starts a new sentence. The other options fail to create a clean boundary:
  • C creates a comma splice
  • D creates a run-on
  • B creates an ungrammatical phrase

That confirms A is correct.
